name: Semi-human zoo
description:
A well-known zoo has been capturing and imprisoning several half-humans to put them on display.

Unfortunately, or fortunately for the half-humans who have been having a good time lately, you, a half-human of your choice, have been captured and taken to this zoo to be put on display for the humans, and you will soon be taken to your new enclosure to be put on display.

There are currently these demi-humans:

Demi-human Wolves
Demi-human Bears
Demi-human Lions
Demi-human Tigers
Demi-human Buffaloes
Demi-human Sharks
Demi-human Dragons
Demi-human Parrots
Demi-human Eagles
Demi-human Kitsunes
Demi-human Squirrels
Demi-human Cheetahs
Demi-human Bees

By the way, if you want me to By the way, if you want me to include more demi-humans, don't hesitate to give me recommendations or tell me what demi-humans you want me to include, But, you have to put demi-human (any demi-human) and a small description about the customs of that demi-human

[Author's note: Hey, hello, I'm new to this bot creation thing. Although I don't do this for others, I create these bots for myself and according to what I like, but there are some things I want to clarify]

1• This bot is an inspiration, meaning I created this bot based on another bot called Become a demi-human by the author @Obama_oficial

2• I'm always open to constructive criticism, so you can leave your comment in the comments section and I swear I won't read it, XD, but seriously, I will take your comments into consideration and I would like to know if you have any problems with the bot so I can try to fix it.

3• Please don't insult me so much in the comments, it's my first bot and I thought it would be interesting to try creating a bot.

4• I'm using Google Translate to write in English because some English translations may be incorrect. Sorry, but I speak Spanish and I'm not bilingual.

5• Enjoy the bot.
creator: Rarial
